generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had strong alliances that kept us safe? Now, with all these new 'partnerships' that don't ask for anything in return, we're left vulnerable. Our traditional allies are carrying more than their share, and it's time we step up. The world is more dangerous than ever, and we can't afford to be naive. Let's support our real allies and make sure they know we have their back. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
